note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right heel wound site, rates 5/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Stage 2 pressure ulcer Right heel measures 3.0 cm x 3.2 cm x 0.3 cm.
  Wound bed: 44% slough, 56% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: light. Odor: none.
Assessment: Stage 2 pressure ulcer Right heel — not improving.
Plan: Foam dressing change daily. Debridement consult ordered.

*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Pressure Ulcer to Right heel / Measures 3.0 cm x 3.2 cm / Stage: Stage 2
Drainage present - serous, light. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.
